title: Eyes of the Devil (2021)
overview: Exploring the underground world of trafficking, where children are used for prostitution and organ harvesting. Patryk Vega interviews a mother who intends on selling her unborn child to traffickers.

trailers.title: „EYES OF THE DEVIL”. A DOCUMENTARY FILM BY PATRYK VEGA.
